_comment: Placeholder list prices in USD per user per month. Override these with your tenant's actual EA/MCA pricing -- the values shipped here are NOT a quote, just sensible defaults for the savings-estimate dashboard. Run Get-MgSubscribedSku for the exact SkuPartNumber values to use as keys.
_comment_currency: All values in USD/user/month. Change the keys (e.g. EUR/GBP) only by updating the dashboard rendering text; the math is currency-agnostic.
_comment_override: To use real prices, copy this file to templates/license-prices.json (already the default path) and edit. The dashboard surfaces both 'list' and 'estimated' so it's clear when an override is in effect.
